primary_collapse.title: Tāuta te mahere pai mō tō hiahia
primary_collapse.email_quota_helptext: Ka tātaritia e mātou tō rārangi i runga i te maha o ngā tono, kāore i runga i te maha o ngā īmēra tono arotake kua tukuna. Hei tauira, mēnā ka tukuna e koe e toru ngā īmēra (tono, whakamaharatanga, me te mihi), ka kiia anō he kotahi noa iho.

1.title: Me pēhea te tatau i te rahinga tono arotake?
1.subtitle: Kei te āhua o te maha o ngā ota te tatau rahinga. Mēnā ka whakahohea e koe ngā momo mēra katoa e toru—Tono Arotake, Whakamaumahara Arotake, me te Whakawhetai. Kotahi noa te rahinga ka tatauhia mō ia ota.

2.title: Ka whakamahia taku rahinga mēnā kāore au e tuku tono arotake mā TrustShop?
2.subtitle: Kāo, ka tangohia tō rahinga anake mēnā ka whakamahi koe i te āhuatanga tono arotake a TrustShop. Mēnā kāore koe e whakamahi i tēnei āhuatanga, kāore tō rahinga e pāngia.

3.title: Ka taea e au te heke iho i taku mahere?
3.subtitle: Āe, ka taea e koe te heke iho i tō mahere i ngā wā katoa mēnā kāore koe e hiahia ana i ngā āhuatanga utu. Me mōhio koe ki te whakakore i ngā āhuatanga utu katoa i mua i te hekenga iho. Mēnā e hiahia ana koe i te āwhina, kei konei tonu tō mātou rōpū tautoko hei āwhina i a koe.

4.title: Ka utua au i te wā o te wā whakamātautau?
4.subtitle: Kāo, kāore koe e utua i te wā whakamātautau. Ka timata ngā utu anake i te mutunga o te wā whakamātautau.

modal_charge_success.title: Kei te membre {{plan}} ināianei!
modal_charge_success.content: Ngā mihi mō te whiriwhiri i tā mātou rēhita premium! Whakaritea mō ngā painga motuhake me ngā tautoko tino pai. Kia waiho tēnei haerenga hei tino whakamīharo.

special_offer.title: Tukunga Motuhake: 30% Whakataunga mō tōu piringa!
special_offer.content: Hei whakaatu i tō mātou maioha mō tō tautoko, kei te tuku mātou he <1>30% whakataunga motuhake</1> ki a koe mō tētahi mahere ohaurunga mō ngā marama e rua e haere ake nei. Ngā mihi mō tōu noho hei kiritaki nui!
special_offer.remain_time: Wā e toe ana mō te tuku:
